Event: Cornucopia Island February 2026
Event Date: 05/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR395
Blessing of the Ocean Outfit

Once in a while, the unit removes all negative effects from self, and becomes immune to them for 4 sec. The unit also restores 30% health to self and applies the harmony effect to self and 2 random allied units for 4 sec. For that duration, every unit with the harmony effect restores 120000 health every second, and all allied units in a small radius around the healed unit restore health equal to 65% of the health restored by the original targets. When the harmony effect ends, the ability's targets and all allied units in a small radius around them have their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor increased by 30% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
